plugins.name: safeguards
plugins.description: Defensive PreToolUse guards for Claude Code: block reading secret files (Read + best-effort Bash), block AI-attribution commit trailers, and block force-pushes to protected branches. Hooks-only — no skills, commands, or credentials.

plugins.name: announce
plugins.description: Speaks Claude Code's status aloud via macOS `say`, each announcement preceded by a distinct earcon chime (afplay), so you can step away and be called back: announces when Claude finishes a turn, starts a new task, needs your input/permission, or a subagent finishes. Hooks-only — no skills, commands, or credentials.
